company.name: AutoStream
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators. With AI-powered features, AutoStream helps YouTubers, Instagram creators, and other video producers edit, enhance, and publish content faster than ever.

plans.name: Basic Plan
plans.best_for: Hobbyist creators or those just starting out

plans.name: Pro Plan
features: All export formats including WebM and GIF
plans.best_for: Professional content creators, agencies, and full-time YouTubers

policies.detail: No refunds are issued after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refund requests within the first 7 days will be honored with no questions asked.
24/7 live support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive email support with a response time of up to 48 hours.
Users can upgrade from Basic to Pro at any time. The price difference is prorated for the remaining billing cycle.
Users can cancel their subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the billing period.

faqs.question: Can I try AutoStream before buying?
faqs.answer: Yes, AutoStream offers a 7-day free trial on both plans. No credit card is required to start.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Twitter/X. Export presets are available for all major platforms.

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: There is no permanent free plan, but a 7-day free trial is available.

faqs.question: Can I use AutoStream on mobile?
faqs.answer: AutoStream is a web-based platform accessible from any browser. A dedicated mobile app is on the roadmap.
